title: aster microlonchus
intro: Aster microlonchus, also known as the small-flowered alpine aster or small alpine aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster microlonchus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Aster microlonchus, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
